_readme: Copy to <episode>/remotion-props/<locale>.json. Keys are composition IDs in packages/remotion-graphics (see its README for prop schemas). Text comes verbatim from script.<locale>.md — never retype from memory. durationSec is filled by tools/render-overlays.mjs from the beat's target_duration_sec, but can be preset here. For subtitle-track, leave srt empty — the render tool loads subtitles/<locale>.srt automatically; delete keys for compositions this locale never renders.
